DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM KELLY LINCOLN FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. KELLY LINCOLN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EMILY RICE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE WAS DENIED AS UNTIMLY. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, REPRESENTED BY KELLY LINCOLN IS PRESENT. SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2024. PLAINTFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBTS RETAINED. JUDGE JOSPEH HURLEY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
